'''nabodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibs|nibs]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibs|nibs]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nabodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næbedheth|næbedheth]] || [[word:næbedhej|næbedhej]] || [[word:næbedhesh|næbedhesh]] || [[word:næbedhe|næbedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabobodhoth|nabobodhoth]] || [[word:nabobodhoj|nabobodhoj]] || [[word:nabobodhosh|nabobodhosh]] || [[word:nabobodho|nabobodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabodhoth|nabodhoth]] || [[word:nabodhoj|nabodhoj]] || [[word:nabodhosh|nabodhosh]] || [[word:nabodho|nabodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabofdhoth|nabofdhoth]] || [[word:nabofdhoj|nabofdhoj]] || [[word:nabofdhosh|nabofdhosh]] || [[word:nabofdhof|nabofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nabodhotho|nabodhotho]] || [[word:nabodhojo|nabodhojo]] || [[word:nabodhosho|nabodhosho]] || [[word:nabodhoko|nabodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nabodhoth|nabodhoth]] || [[word:nabodhoj|nabodhoj]] || [[word:nabodhosh|nabodhosh]] || [[word:nabodho|nabodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nabodhothol|nabodhothol]] || [[word:nabodhojol|nabodhojol]] || [[word:nabodhoshol|nabodhoshol]] || [[word:nabodhokol|nabodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nabodhothotho|nabodhothotho]] || [[word:nabodhojojo|nabodhojojo]] || [[word:nabodhoshosho|nabodhoshosho]] || [[word:nabodhoko|nabodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nabodhothon|nabodhothon]] || [[word:nabodhojon|nabodhojon]] || [[word:nabodhoshon|nabodhoshon]] || [[word:nabodhokon|nabodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nabodhothoro|nabodhothoro]] || [[word:nabodhojoro|nabodhojoro]] || [[word:nabodhoshoro|nabodhoshoro]] || [[word:nabodhokoro|nabodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
